summary: Lewis Hamilton converted pole position into his maiden Ferrari victory at Barcelona, holding off challengers through a rain-affected afternoon to secure the Scuderia's first win of the season. Championship leader Kimi Antonelli's retirement after contact with a midfield competitor handed Hamilton an advantage he wouldn't relinquish, allowing the Brit to settle an unsettled first year with the Italian team. The result narrows the gap in the drivers' championship and signals Ferrari's resurgence just as the season reaches its pivotal phase.
